Welcome to the Central Library

The Central Library at UGIP Nainital is the heart of our academic and research activities.

With an ever-growing collection of technical books, national and international journals, and e-resources, we cater to the diverse intellectual needs of our students, researchers, and faculty members.

Our library spans a spacious, fully air-conditioned area, providing a serene and highly comfortable environment designed specifically for focused study and collaborative learning.

Library Facilities

📚

Book Bank Facility

Semester-wise book issuing facility specifically available for economically weaker students.

💻

E-Library Access

High-speed computer terminals providing access to DELNET, IEEE papers, and digital archives.

📖

Reference Section

A vast collection of rare technical books, heavy encyclopedias, and previous year project reports.

🛋️

Quiet Reading Rooms

Peaceful, air-conditioned reading halls with ergonomically designed seating for deep focus.

Library Timings

The library remains open throughout the week during standard academic hours.

Days Opening Hours Status
Monday – Friday 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Open
Saturday 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM Half Day
Sunday & Public Holidays — Closed

Mrs. Hema Pant

Senior Librarian, UGIP Nainital
M.Lib, 15+ years experience

library@ugipnainital.ac.in
Library Rules
  • Absolute silence must be maintained in the library premises.
  • Mobile phones must be switched off or kept on silent mode.
  • Valid Identity Card is mandatory for entering and issuing books.
  • Eatable items and beverages are strictly not allowed.
  • Books must be returned on or before the due date to avoid fines.
